biomes.description: Arid expanses with sandy dunes, sparse rocks, and dry air.
Murky, chemically contaminated shorelines near the industrial sectors.
Scrublands littered with strip-mining runoff and industrial scrap material.
Yellowed, dry grass plains interspersed with specialized organic trees.

arial.description: Deeply fissured crystalline rock faces surrounded by thick, highly pressurized sulfuric mist.

aberdeen.description: Craggy, corrosive terrain choked under a thick, poisonous greenish-yellow atmosphere with extreme ambient heat.

magda.description: Desolate plains dominated by contrasting colorful mineral stains and sharp, rocky outcrop formations.

ita.description: Muted, windswept gray vistas broken up by ancient craters and deeply carved rocky canyons.

biomes.description: Layers of high-altitude clouds, violent wind currents, and breathable air pockets housing the floating city of Orison.

cellin.description: Dormant geysers and active cryo-volcanoes scattered across white-hot thermal sand and jagged rock formations.

daymar.description: Sweeping, high-altitude sand dunes continually reshaped by fierce dust storms, featuring vast canyon networks.

yela.description: Massive frozen sheets and deep crevasse systems surrounded by a ring of dense orbiting asteroids.

biomes.description: A completely terraformed artificial biome dominated by continuous skyscrapers, industrial factories, and glowing commercial plazas.

lyria.description: Glacial valleys rich in glowing liquid methane pools and erupting cryo-geysers.

wala.description: Striking, brightly colored mineral deposits mixed with sharp topaz-like crystal clusters jutting from a low-gravity crust.

biomes.description: Snow-capped rocky peaks subject to sudden, severe blizzards.
Dense clusters of evergreen trees surviving in sub-zero conditions.
Glacial plains and harsh permafrost landscapes found near the poles.
Mild, localized green valleys showcasing resilient planetary flora.
Massive expanses of solid sheet ice visible from high orbit.

calliope.description: Exceedingly low-temperature plains subject to blinding high-velocity windstorms over stark white snowdrifts.

clio.description: Resilient, pinkish coastal flora borders freezing liquid oceans and snow-touched landmasses.

euterpe.description: An ultra-smooth, high-albedo frozen shell with sparse rocky spires breaking the horizon.

biomes.description: Molten magma rivers and charred rock faces actively torn apart by solar flares.
Sun-bleached badlands rich in heavy raw mineral nodes stripped bare of a protective atmosphere.
Jet-black volcanic glass fields and rough basalt columns resulting from ancient lava flows.
Yellowish, bubbling sulfur pools and highly unstable, crumbly sulfur-rich topsoils.
Violent, churning greenish-blue gas envelope subject to immense pressure shifts.

ignis.description: Grey volcanic ash fields interspersed with cooling obsidian ridges.

vatra.description: High atmospheric pressure traps dense carbon gases over deep, treacherous trenches.

adir.description: Sharply eroded orange canyons featuring labyrinthine cave networks.

fairo.description: Dark, sludgy valleys filled with sticky organic runoffs and heavy crude compounds.

fuego.description: Ripped-apart rock plains continuously reshaped by surface magma pooling.

vuur.description: Extremely dark, sub-zero outer moon covered in thick slabs of methane-ice.

biomes.description: Freezing dark frontier rock faces blanketed by eternal frost far from the system's dying star.
